scripts.version:patch: npm version patch && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('version.json', JSON.stringify({...require('./version.json'), version: require('./package.json').version}, null, 2))"
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('version.json', JSON.stringify({...require('./version.json'), version: require('./package.json').version}, null, 2))"
scripts.version:major: npm version major && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('version.json', JSON.stringify({...require('./version.json'), version: require('./package.json').version}, null, 2))"
